all.en: Both parties met on Tuesday to negotiate the master service agreement.
all.zh: 雙方於週二會面協商主服務合約。

all.en: The meeting was attended by legal counsel and procurement leaders.
all.zh: 會議由法務顧問與採購主管出席。

all.en: Our team was represented by the regional director and account manager.
all.zh: 我方由區域總監與客戶經理代表出席。

all.en: Discussions focused on pricing, payment terms, and liability clauses.
all.zh: 討論聚焦於定價、付款條件與責任條款。

all.en: The client requested a five percent discount on the annual subscription.
all.zh: 客戶要求年度訂閱費五個百分點的折扣。

all.en: We offered three percent in exchange for a three year commitment.
all.zh: 我方提出三個百分點，以換取三年承諾。

all.en: Net forty five payment terms were proposed instead of net thirty.
all.zh: 客戶提出四十五天淨付款條件以取代三十天淨付款。

all.en: Our finance team approved net forty as a reasonable compromise.
all.zh: 我方財務團隊核准四十天淨付款作為合理折衷。

all.en: The limitation of liability cap was a major point of debate.
all.zh: 責任上限條款是主要的爭論焦點。

all.en: The client wanted unlimited liability for data breach incidents.
all.zh: 客戶希望資料外洩事件採無限責任。

all.en: We countered with a cap equal to twelve months of fees.
all.zh: 我方反提以十二個月費用為上限。

all.en: Indemnification language will be redrafted by both legal teams.
all.zh: 賠償條款語言將由雙方法務團隊重新草擬。

all.en: Service level commitments were agreed at ninety nine point five percent uptime.
all.zh: 服務水準承諾協議為百分之九十九點五的可用率。

all.en: Service credits will apply when monthly uptime falls below target.
all.zh: 當月度可用率低於目標時將適用服務點數補償。

all.en: Data residency requirements call for storage within the European Union.
all.zh: 資料駐留要求需將資料儲存於歐盟境內。

all.en: We confirmed our regional data center supports this requirement.
all.zh: 我方確認區域資料中心可支援此項要求。

all.en: Termination for convenience requires ninety days written notice.
all.zh: 便利終止需提前九十天書面通知。

all.en: Auto renewal will trigger unless either party objects in writing.
all.zh: 除非任一方以書面拒絕，否則合約將自動續約。

all.en: Confidentiality obligations survive for five years after termination.
all.zh: 保密義務於合約終止後仍延續五年。

all.en: Open issues will be documented in a tracker shared between teams.
all.zh: 未決事項將記錄於雙方共享的追蹤表中。

all.en: The next negotiation session is scheduled for next Thursday afternoon.
all.zh: 下次協商會議排定於下週四下午。

all.en: We aim to complete signature by the end of the month.
all.zh: 我們目標於月底前完成簽署。

all.en: Overall, the meeting was constructive and forward looking.
all.zh: 整體而言，會議具建設性且具前瞻性。

all.en: Both sides expressed strong interest in finalizing the partnership.
all.zh: 雙方皆表達儘速完成合作的強烈意願。

all.en: Following the meeting, action items were distributed to all attendees within two hours.
all.zh: 會議結束後，行動事項於兩小時內分發予所有與會者。

all.en: Our procurement lead will circulate a clean redline draft by Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 我方採購主管將於週五下午提供乾淨的紅線修訂版草稿。

all.en: The client legal team committed to reviewing the indemnification revisions over the weekend.
all.zh: 客戶法務團隊承諾於週末審閱賠償條款的修訂。

all.en: An information security questionnaire will be exchanged before the next session.
all.zh: 下次會議前雙方將交換資安問卷。

all.en: We agreed to align on a transition plan covering implementation, onboarding, and training.
all.zh: 雙方同意就涵蓋導入、上線及訓練的轉換計畫達成共識。

all.en: The client expressed interest in a pilot deployment to two of its operating subsidiaries.
all.zh: 客戶表達有意先於兩家營運子公司進行先導部署。

all.en: Pilot success metrics will include adoption rate, ticket volume, and user satisfaction.
all.zh: 先導案的成功指標將包括採用率、工單量及使用者滿意度。

all.en: Executive sponsors from both companies will meet to formally endorse the agreement.
all.zh: 雙方公司之執行贊助者將會晤以正式背書本協議。

all.en: A joint press release may be considered upon mutually agreed timing after signing.
all.zh: 簽約後可在雙方議定時點考量發布聯合新聞稿。

all.en: We look forward to a long-lasting and mutually beneficial business relationship.
all.zh: 我們期待長久且互惠的商務關係。

all.en: Outstanding commercial points include intellectual property ownership of jointly developed work.
all.zh: 尚待處理的商業議題包含共同開發成果的智慧財產所有權歸屬。

all.en: Audit rights for the customer will be granted on an annual basis with prior notice.
all.zh: 客戶之稽核權利將以事先通知後每年一次的方式授予。

all.en: Both sides agreed to align change control procedures with their respective governance frameworks.
all.zh: 雙方同意使變更控制程序與各自治理架構保持一致。

all.en: A data processing addendum will be finalized in parallel with the master agreement.
all.zh: 資料處理附約將與主合約同步定稿。

all.en: Subcontracting will require prior written consent on a case-by-case basis.
all.zh: 分包行為須個案取得事先書面同意。

all.en: Insurance coverage requirements were reviewed and confirmed as compliant with policy minimums.
all.zh: 保險保障要求已審查並確認符合保單最低標準。

all.en: Force majeure language will be expanded to address public health emergencies explicitly.
all.zh: 不可抗力條款文字將擴大以明確處理公共衛生緊急事件。

all.en: A joint steering committee will meet quarterly to oversee partnership health.
all.zh: 聯合指導委員會將每季開會以監督合作夥伴關係的健康度。

all.en: Both teams agreed to conduct a 12-month relationship review after the go-live date.
all.zh: 雙方團隊同意於上線後十二個月進行一次關係檢討。

all.en: We appreciate the client team for their thorough preparation and pragmatic approach throughout.
all.zh: 感謝客戶團隊全程縝密的準備與務實的態度。
